note_text:
Subjective: Patient reports pain at Left foot wound site, rates 9/10.
Objective: Wound assessment performed. Diabetic diabetic Left foot measures 4.3 cm x 4.7 cm x 1.2 cm.
  Wound bed: 59% slough, 41% granulation tissue. Periwound: macerated.
  Drainage: heavy. Odor: present, mild.
Assessment: Diabetic diabetic Left foot — improving.
Plan: Foam dressing change daily. Physician notified of wound progression.
